overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment. The character moves from an interior lobby with purple neon accent lighting through a covered pedestrian walkway lined with glass buildings, palm trees, and neon storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern building lobby with neon wall displays

events.description: character approaches and exits the lobby through large glass facade into the covered walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the modern lobby toward the glass exit, passing metallic benches

notable_agents.action: dark colored car driving past on the street visible through the glass windows

entered.detail: modern metallic benches with blue cushioning arranged in the lobby
large wall-mounted screens emitting purple neon light along the right wall
floor-to-ceiling glass windows and doors forming the front of the building
tall palm trees visible through the glass along the street outside
tall glass and steel skyscrapers visible in the distance through the windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a sleek modern lobby with dark wooden flooring and purple neon accent lighting on the walls. The character walks forward past metallic benches toward a large glass facade that reveals a sunny street with palm trees and passing traffic. The environment transitions from interior to exterior as the character approaches the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian shopping arcade with neon storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered pedestrian walkway, navigating past other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking in the opposite direction along the covered walkway
pedestrian in white and red outfit walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: transparent or translucent overhead covering sheltering the pedestrian walkway
tall building with illuminated '05' signage on the facade
green and purple neon signs illuminating storefronts along the right side
large planters with greenery placed along the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a covered pedestrian walkway with tiled flooring and a glass roof overhead. Neon-lit storefronts line the right side while palm trees and modern skyscrapers are visible through the open left side. The character walks past other pedestrians in both directions, with the environment featuring a mix of natural daylight and artificial neon illumination.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a moody, neon-lit interior into a bright, futuristic urban pedestrian corridor. It begins inside a sleek modern lobby with dark wooden flooring and purple accent lighting, moving past metallic benches toward a large glass facade. As the character exits the building, the environment transitions from the dim interior to a sunny street filled with palm trees and passing traffic. The scene then opens into a covered pedestrian walkway with tiled flooring and a glass roof, where the lighting shifts into a blend of natural daylight and artificial neon from the surrounding storefronts. Finally, the camera continues forward past other pedestrians, flanked by towering skyscrapers and lush greenery under the open sky.
